params.name: Electromagnetism
params.description:
On Feb 2, 1873 AD, Maxwell published Electromagnetism and put forward the Maxwell equations.
In his book, Maxwell provided a comprehensive and systematic description from the discovery of Coulomb's law to the establishment of Maxwell's equations. He revealed that changing magnetic fields can excite electric fields and changing electric fields can excite magnetic fields, thus showing that alternating electric fields and alternating magnetic fields are interconvertible, interconnected, and unif …
